name_en: Extra Large Size⭐️⭐️⭐️ WCHANEL 24P hobo Extra Large. This season's hobo is really popular!! They all look good. If you are relatively thin, you can press down the logo area. It feels like pressing down the center zipper would look better and more casual. Tall girls should go for it! The size is really suitable, and the leather is durable, perfect for autumn and winter. Sweet cool vibe~ Petite girls can consider the small size, it's also very nice! Details: Light gold hardware with shiny calfskin, very textured! Underarm carry, there is a Chanel small logo on the chain from the front, very detailed! This SA was really hesitant to buy it or snatch it from someone else. The last one because the caviar leather is very durable. Size: 35x 23 x 11cm Style AS 4246
